englishDefinitions: A phrase that represents traditional American values seen as wholesome, patriotic, and morally respectable.
A cliché used to describe an idealized picture of family, religion, and patriotism.
persianTranslation: کلیشه‌ای درباره خانواده، دین و میهن‌پرستی
examples: The campaign appealed to mom, God and apple pie values.
Some critics say the ad relies on mom, God and apple pie imagery.
That movie presents a mom, God and apple pie version of America.
